_meta.description: 50 canonical SPL queries with expected output shapes. Results are stub/approximate for fixture data — exact counts update as real GPU executor is implemented (R2-C3).

queries.spl: index=firewall | stats count
index=firewall | stats count by action
queries.description: Event count grouped by firewall action

queries.spl: index=firewall action=deny | stats count by src_ip | sort -count | head 10
index=firewall | stats count by dst_port | sort -count | head 20
index=firewall | stats sum(bytes) as total_bytes by src_ip | sort -total_bytes | head 5
queries.description: Top 5 source IPs by bytes sent

queries.spl: index=firewall | timechart span=1h count by action
queries.description: Event count over time by action (1h buckets)

queries.spl: index=firewall protocol=tcp action=allow | stats dc(dst_ip) as unique_dsts by src_ip | sort -unique_dsts | head 10
queries.description: Top 10 TCP sources by unique destination IPs (fan-out detection)

queries.spl: index=firewall dst_port=22 action=deny | stats count by src_ip | where count > 5
queries.description: SSH brute-force candidates (>5 denials on port 22)

queries.spl: index=firewall | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | stats count by hour | sort hour
queries.description: Event distribution by hour of day

queries.spl: index=firewall | stats avg(bytes) as avg_bytes, max(bytes) as max_bytes, min(bytes) as min_bytes
index=firewall | eval is_internal=if(match(src_ip, "^10\."), "yes", "no") | stats count by is_internal
index=firewall action=deny dst_port IN (22, 23, 3389, 5900) | stats count by dst_port, src_ip | sort -count
index=firewall | dedup src_ip | stats count
index=firewall | rex field=_raw "src=(?P<parsed_src>[\d.]+)" | stats count by parsed_src | head 5
queries.description: Rex field extraction from raw text

queries.spl: index=firewall | eval bytes_kb=round(bytes/1024, 2) | stats sum(bytes_kb) as total_kb
index=firewall | table _time, src_ip, dst_ip, dst_port, action, bytes | head 100
index=firewall | fields src_ip, dst_ip, action | head 50
index=firewall | rename src_ip AS source_ip, dst_ip AS destination_ip | head 10
index=firewall action=deny | sort _time | head 25
index=firewall | stats count by host | sort -count
index=windows | stats count by EventCode | sort -count
index=windows EventCode=4625 | stats count by AccountName | sort -count | head 10
index=windows EventCode=4624 LogonType=3 | stats count by src_ip | sort -count | head 10
index=windows EventCode=4688 | stats count by ComputerName | sort -count
index=windows EventCode=4672 | stats dc(AccountName) as privileged_users
queries.description: Count of distinct accounts with special privileges

queries.spl: index=windows | timechart span=30m count by EventCode
queries.description: Windows events over time by EventCode (30min buckets)

queries.spl: index=windows EventCode=4625 | streamstats count as fail_count by AccountName | where fail_count > 3
queries.description: Streamstats — progressive failure count per account

queries.spl: index=windows | eval logon_type_name=case(LogonType="2", "Interactive", LogonType="3", "Network", LogonType="10", "RemoteInteractive", true(), "Other") | stats count by logon_type_name
index=windows | eval ts_human=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table ts_human, EventCode, AccountName | head 20
index=windows | where EventCode IN (4624, 4625, 4634) | stats count by EventCode
index=windows EventCode=4624 | stats count by AccountName, AccountDomain | sort -count | head 15
index=firewall | stats count by protocol | sort -count
index=firewall | eval port_class=if(dst_port<1024, "privileged", "ephemeral") | stats count by port_class
index=firewall bytes>10000 | stats sum(bytes) as heavy_bytes, count by src_ip | sort -heavy_bytes | head 10
index=firewall | stats count by src_ip, dst_ip | where count > 50 | sort -count
index=firewall | eventstats avg(bytes) as global_avg | eval anomaly=if(bytes > global_avg*3, "high", "normal") | stats count by anomaly
index=firewall | tail 100
index=firewall action=deny | dedup src_ip sortby -_time | table src_ip, dst_ip, dst_port | head 20
queries.description: Dedup keeping most recent event per src_ip

queries.spl: index=firewall | tstats count where index=firewall by action
queries.description: tstats — direct columnar scan without raw decompression

queries.spl: index=firewall | stats count by policy | sort -count
index=firewall | bucket _time span=1d | stats sum(bytes) as daily_bytes by _time | sort _time
index=windows | stats values(EventCode) as event_codes by ComputerName | sort ComputerName
queries.description: Values aggregation function — collect all event codes per host

queries.spl: index=windows | stats first(_time) as first_seen, last(_time) as last_seen by AccountName
index=firewall | eval dst_port=tonumber(dst_port) | where dst_port < 1024 AND action="deny" | stats count by dst_port | sort dst_port
index=firewall | stats count by src_ip | appendcols [search index=windows | stats count by src_ip]
index=firewall | stats count by dst_port | sort dst_port | where count > 100
index=windows | rex field=_raw "AccountName=(?P<acct>\S+)" | stats count by acct | sort -count | head 10
queries.description: Rex extraction from Windows raw log

queries.spl: index=firewall earliest=-1h | stats count
index=firewall | stats count by action, protocol | sort action, -count

index=windows EventCode=4625 | stats count as failures by AccountName | join type=left AccountName [search index=windows EventCode=4624 | stats count as successes by AccountName] | eval success_rate=round(successes/(successes+failures)*100, 1) | sort -failures | head 20
queries.description: Join — correlate login failures and successes per account
